candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label at the top of the income statement; preferred over duplicated total revenue wording.
Also a valid revenue line, but appears to duplicate Operating revenues exactly and is less preferred than the more specific operating revenue label.
COGS, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income attribution line, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.
Tax liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, with Operating revenues preferred and Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct production input cost and plausible COGS component, but a more explicit COGS line exists.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Explicit COGS label, but appears only in some years and differs from the broader consistently populated COGS row.
Inventory adjustment component, not standalone COGS.
Most explicit and consistently populated direct-cost line; best match for COGS.
Inventory asset on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS row rather than raw-material and inventory subcomponents to avoid partial capture and double counting.

candidates.why: Overhead/personnel cost component and a standard SG&A-type operating expense.
Broad overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Operating overhead component, but appears in supplemental detail and may already be embedded in broader operating expense lines.
R&D-related supplemental line appears below operating profit; not suitable to include in SG&A here.
Dedicated R&D line appears below operating profit/supplemental section, so do not include in SG&A to avoid misclassification.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the main overhead buckets above Operating profit. Excluded depreciation/amortization, totals, and the below-EBIT supplemental R&D lines.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization only, not the full R&D expense.
R&D-related disclosure, but likely supplemental rather than the primary expense line.
Most direct dedicated R&D expense label.
Capitalized development asset, not period R&D expense.
Broader expenditure disclosure, likely not the accounting expense line preferred for XRD.
Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D expense line. It appears in a supplemental/below-EBIT section, so it was not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Net/broader finance-cost subtotal; less preferred than underlying recurring components when those are available.
Core recurring interest expense component.

Profit attribution line, not finance cost.
Profit attribution line, not finance cost.
Comprehensive income attribution line, not finance cost.

Debt balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.
Lease liability balance, not period interest expense.
Debt liability, not period interest expense.
Equity attribution line, not finance cost.
Equity attribution line, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components rather than Financial expenses total. Added 'Other Financial Exp' from the income statement preview even though it was not in the candidate list, because it appears to be a recurring finance-cost component and the candidate list misses it. candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet book equity.
Comprehensive income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Best semantic match for parent/owner equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE when a parent-equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected Majority equity because it should exclude non-controlling interests. However, the balance sheet preview shows two separate rows with the exact same label 'Majority equity' but different values in some years, creating ambiguity that cannot be resolved from label-only mapping.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement OCI attribution line, less preferred than balance sheet equity line.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority-interest line and useful as fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list; both appear to represent the same concept across years.
